message:
Fix 6 valid Copilot review findings from recent PRs (#11127)

- Fix ToolPreflightResult type: passed → ok in 9 test files
- Add isError field to ChatStreamPayload TypeScript interface
- Remove unsafe type cast for isError check in useMissions
- Gate emitMissionCompleted analytics on non-error results
- URL-encode DELETE params in storage.ts deleteResourceQuota
- Fix double-close in 5 modal components (use handleClose)
- Fix test name typo: StripsStalTokens → StripsStaleTokens

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

     emitActionClicked('fix_with_ai', 'policy_violations', 'compliance')
-    onClose() // Close modal so mission sidebar is visible

     startMission({
       title: `Fix: ${violation.policy} violations`,
       description: `${violation.count} violations from ${violation.tool} on ${(violation.clusters || []).join(', ')}`,
@@ -68,7 +68,6 @@ Please proceed step by step.`,

-    handleClose()
   }
 
   if (!violation) return null
